items.name: C
items.description: A powerful, general-purpose language for system programming, embedded systems, and performance-critical applications.

items.name: C++
items.description: An extension of C with object-oriented features, used in game engines, OS, and complex software.

items.name: Python
items.description: High-level, versatile language for web dev, data science, AI, scripting, and automation.

items.name: Java
items.description: Class-based, object-oriented language for enterprise apps, Android development, and large systems.

items.name: HTML5
items.description: Standard markup language for creating web pages and applications with rich multimedia and graphics.

items.name: CSS3
items.description: Styling language for web documents, enabling animations, transitions, and responsive design.

items.name: JavaScript
items.description: Essential for interactive web content; also used in non-browser environments via Node.js.

items.name: React
items.description: A JavaScript library for building user interfaces, widely used for creating single-page applications and dynamic UIs.

items.name: SQL
items.description: Language for managing and querying data in relational database management systems (RDBMS).

items.name: Verilog
items.description: Hardware description language (HDL) for modeling electronic systems like FPGAs and ASICs.

items.name: ROS
items.description: Flexible framework for writing robot software, simplifying complex robot behavior development.

items.name: Firebase
items.description: Google's platform for mobile/web app development with real-time databases, auth, and hosting.

items.name: Android Studio
items.description: Official IDE for Android app development, built on IntelliJ IDEA for coding, debugging, and testing.
